meta_description: Daksh Sengar is a developer specialized in AI & Machine Learning, based in Greater Noida, India. Skilled in Python, Data Science, Web Development and Research.
bento_one_paragraph: Proficient in Python, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib and Seaborn. I build data pipelines and analytical tools that turn raw data into actionable insights.
bento_two_paragraph: Working at the intersection of data, behavior and prediction. I build and train models that solve real problems, from classification to pattern recognition.
bento_three_paragraph: Building responsive, performant web applications using HTML, CSS, JavaScript and modern frameworks. Clean code that does the job without making a fuss.
bento_four_paragraph: Proficient in Git, GitHub, Linux and SQL. I research emerging technologies and apply methodical thinking to solve complex problems.
